title: ornithopus junceus
intro: Ornithopus junceus, also known as burr medic or sweet burr, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Ornithopus junceus has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as promoting bone health and reducing stress. Ornithopus junceus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
